title: Bridge Essay: The Neural Mechanisms of Meditative Practices: Novel Approaches for Healthy Agin

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.

**The Neural Mechanisms of Meditative Practices: Novel Approaches for Healthy Aging.** — Curr Behav Neurosci Rep. PMID: 27909646. DOI: 10.1007/s40473-016-0098-x. Meditation has been shown to have physical, cognitive, and psychological health benefits that can be used to promote healthy aging. However, the common and specific mechanisms of response remain elusive due to the diverse nature of mind-body practices. In this review, we aim to compare the neural circuits implicated in focused-attention meditative practices that focus on present-moment awareness to those involved in active-type meditative practices (e.g., yoga) that combine movement, including c...
